case_title: JULIAN CASTILLO VS. DANILO AMABEL MORAN

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNED TO CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, JULIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, DANILO AMABEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA D A M CONSTRUCTION

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, JULIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, DANILO AMABEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA D A M CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
